violations.text: The floor in the back storage area and other various location has a small accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the back storage area and bottom shelf of the pet section have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The floor throughout the facility( behind freezers, underneath shelving, in the corners of the retail section, large accumulation of back storage area floors, and pet food pallets) has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
A dead rodent was observed under the pet food aisle. Dead rodents must be removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the back storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The floor throughout the facility( behind freezers, underneath shelving, in the corners of the retail section, large accumulation of back storage area floors, and pet food pallets) has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings, dead rodents, and nesting material. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
3 dead rodents were observed throughout the store. Dead rodents shall be removed from the premises. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Boxes of chips were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving, primarily in the pet food and back storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The floor throughout the facility has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Several bags of candy were observed adulterated. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of droppings, adulterated product, and over a dozen dead mice on traps. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Over a dozen dead mice were observed on various glue traps. PIC started disposing of rodents at the time of inspection. Establishment to dispose of dead rodents when observed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Boxes of chips were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The floor throughout the facility has an accumulation of food debris and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The ceiling in the retail area is in poor repair(Missing tiles, water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The floor in the corner of the back storage area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving of the main refrigeration unit in the self service area and the single door cooler have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
